title: ServiceVersion
description: A version of a Fastly service. Versions represent distinct configurations that can be activated or deactivated independently.

service_id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the service.

active.description: Whether this version is currently active.

locked.description: Whether this version is locked and cannot be modified.

deployed.description: Whether this version has been deployed.

staging.description: Whether this version is in the staging environment.

testing.description: Whether this version is in the testing environment.

comment.description: A freeform descriptive note about the version.

created_at.description: The date and time in ISO 8601 format when the version was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time in ISO 8601 format when the version was last updated.

deleted_at.description: The date and time in ISO 8601 format when the version was deleted.
